mapping.description:
Extracts navigation records from a Firefox `places` sqlite database. It records each visited URL together with its title, visit timestamp, visit count, and the referring page (if any). Each row corresponds to a single page visit, allowing reconstruction of browsing activity over time.
- URL and page title provide the content accessed. - Visit timestamp indicates when the page was opened. - Visit count shows frequency of access. - Referrer reveals navigation paths.
mapping.query: SELECT moz_places.url, moz_places.title, moz_historyvisits.visit_date/1000 as visit_date_ms, moz_places.visit_count, referer.url as referer, moz_places.hidden FROM moz_places LEFT JOIN moz_historyvisits on moz_places.id = moz_historyvisits.place_id LEFT JOIN moz_places referer on referer.id = moz_places.origin_id WHERE visit_date_ms is not null

field.description: Timestamp when the page was visited
Number of times the page has been visited
URL of the referring page, if any
Flag indicating whether the entry is hidden from history (1 = hidden)
